name: AuthService
business_capability: Single sign-on and identity management platform
notes: Critical risk: Okta contract ends Q2 2026 with no renewal agreed.

name: CoreDataWarehouse
business_capability: Central data warehouse — single source of truth for all research and operational data
technology_stack: PostgreSQL 15, dbt, Apache Airflow, AWS RDS
notes: Runtime dependency on AuthService for service-to-service auth.

name: CallCentre Suite
business_capability: CATI telephony integration platform managing outbound call campaigns and interviewer scripting
notes: Genesys PureConnect vendor contract expires December 2026 with no renewal path. No replacement plan formalised.

name: ForecastTool
business_capability: Annual budget forecasting model for headcount and spend projections
notes: No named owner since Finance Business Partner left Q1 2025. No version control.

name: InsightHub
business_capability: Client-facing analytics dashboard for self-service data exploration
notes: Primary client-facing product. React SPA with Node BFF.
